home.title: Rice Leaf Disease
home.subtitle: Upload a rice leaf image and get instant AI-powered disease diagnosis. Helping farmers protect their crops with precision agriculture technology.
home.feature1Desc: Take a photo of your rice leaf or upload from your gallery for instant analysis.
home.feature2Desc: Our deep learning model scans for disease patterns with high precision.
home.feature3Desc: Receive detailed diagnosis with confidence scores and treatment recommendations.

detection.title: Disease Detection
detection.subtitle: Upload a rice leaf image for AI-powered diagnosis
detection.uploadDesc: Drag & drop or click to browse
detection.tip1: Ensure the leaf is in clear focus
detection.tip2: Use natural lighting for best results
detection.tip3: Capture the full leaf in frame
detection.tip4: Avoid shadows across the leaf surface

chatbot.title: AI Field Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask me anything about rice diseases
chatbot.botGreeting: Hello! I'm your AI agricultural assistant. Ask me about rice diseases, symptoms, treatments, or farming best practices.

about.title: About Rice Leaf AI
about.subtitle: AI-powered rice disease detection and intelligent farming assistant
about.missionDesc: Rice Leaf AI empowers farmers, students, and agricultural experts with advanced artificial intelligence to detect rice leaf diseases early, reduce crop losses, and improve productivity. Along with accurate disease detection, our AI chatbot provides instant guidance on symptoms, treatments, prevention methods, and best farming practices using a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) knowledge base.
about.disease1Desc: Bacterial disease caused by Xanthomonas oryzae resulting in yellowing and drying of leaves.
about.disease2Desc: Fungal disease caused by Bipolaris oryzae producing brown oval lesions.
about.disease3Desc: Fungal disease causing large irregular lesions with scorched leaf edges.
about.disease4Desc: Caused by Magnaporthe oryzae creating spindle-shaped gray lesions.
about.disease5Desc: Produces narrow dark brown streaks along the leaf veins.
about.disease6Desc: Healthy rice leaf with no visible disease symptoms.
about.disease7Desc: Image does not contain a rice leaf and cannot be classified.
about.developerRole: Computer Science & Engineering Student | Full Stack & AI Developer

footer.tagline: Protecting rice crops with AI intelligence

result.invalidMessage: The uploaded image does not appear to be a valid rice leaf. Please upload a clear photograph of a rice leaf for analysis.
